evidence_summary: Establish the new quest direction toward Glinda and heighten stakes via the desert road warning. The scene must transition from a state of uncertainty to resolute courage as the group commits to an early departure.

A soldier with green whiskers is summoned. He suggests seeking Glinda, the Good Witch of the South, but warns of the dangers of the desert road. The group accepts the challenge and resolves to leave the next morning.
The group is gathered in the throne room, listening to the summoned soldier.
The group stands together, resolved to depart at dawn.
The soldier delivers a warning about Glinda and the desert; the group accepts the challenge.
